creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to m.ne from comment #13)

The real problem seems to be, that there exists no path /usr/local/share/PyQtsip/3.6/sip, but instead /usr/local/share/PyQt5/3.6/sip/ should be used. I have the same problem with my work on an updated graphics/qgis port (bug #233726).

I suspect --pyqt-sip-dir=${PYQT_SIPDIR} does not create the correct path (or does not work at all)?!
